plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) due to weakness and mandate limits.
Trim SPY and CRWD to reduce concentration and meet mandate limits.
Add NVDU and AVGO from the scanner as strong, high-quality names.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced leverage.
A significant cash buffer will be maintained.
Expect lower volatility and a smaller potential drawdown.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, holding a larger cash buffer. Drawdowns should be minimal.

plan: Trim SOXL to a minimal holding due to its weak status.
Reduce SPY to meet the single name concentration mandate.
Slightly trim QQQI to make room for new opportunities.
Add to CRWD, a strong performer, and initiate new positions in TSLA and APP from the scanner.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction by trimming leverage and concentration.
It blends broad market exposure with quality tech and new opportunities.
balanced.read: This balanced approach targets around 2.5% per month by reducing leverage and concentration while adding high-conviction names. It aims for risk-first growth, blending established holdings with new opportunities. Drawdowns are expected to be moderate.

plan: Increase SOXL exposure, leveraging its strong scanner score and mandate allowance.
Trim SPY to meet concentration limits, freeing capital for higher-conviction plays.
Reduce QQQI to prioritize growth over income.
Add to CRWD and initiate new, high-potential positions in TSLA and NVDU.
This plan aggressively pursues growth by increasing leverage and concentrating in top scanner setups.
Expect higher potential gains but also significantly larger potential drawdowns.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets around 4% per month by embracing leverage and concentrating in the highest-scoring scanner setups. It accepts significantly higher potential drawdowns and the risk of leveraged ETF decay. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

moves.note: Add stable sector name from scanner

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta tech/semis (CRWD, SMH) to eliminate risk.
Significantly increase QQQI to maximize income generation.
Increase SPY allocation for stability and broad market exposure.
Add CVX, a stable sector name from the scanner, for diversification.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly income and capital preservation.
It minimizes volatility and potential drawdowns, parking cash for yield.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets around 1% per month through stable income-generating assets like QQQI and SPY, with minimal risk. It prioritizes capital preservation and reliable distributions over growth. Drawdowns are expected to be very low.
